stimulus: A standard ocean glider, a type of autonomous underwater vehicle, records temperature and currents along set routes. More advanced gliders can collect a broader range of ______blank and operate in polar regions.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. Notice that "collect a broader range of data," "dive to greater depths," and "operate in polar regions" form a list of three verb phrases. Each item in the list must be separated by a comma, just as a comma separates the second and third items.

Choice B is incorrect because a colon cannot be used to separate items within a list. Choice C is incorrect because a comma is needed between the first two items. Choice D is incorrect because the list uses commas throughout and shouldn't switch to a semicolon between items.
